docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF QIN, NANJI AS TO DEFENDANT IRVING TIEN TIEN RESTAURANT, INC. A CALIF CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
